description: RETEST: qwen3 Content-Length fix. Previous test (#363) showed perpetual thinking spinner because Content-Length:0 caused browser to ignore SSE body. Fixed to {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}}. Verify warning message now renders.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads. Submit SSN keyword. CRITICAL: After submit, check if warning message appears in chat (not just spinner). The template should now render: '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다...' in the chat area. Screenshot the result.
services.notes: DB template fixed: Content-Length: 0 → {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}}. Template reloaded. Previous result was STUCK_ON_THINKING. This test validates the fix.

notes: Template Content-Length bug fix verification. All 26 templates updated from CL:0 to {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}} to prevent HTTP/1.1 fallback body-ignore issue.
